notes: Live portal evidence for comparable low-cost flats in Bukit Jalil/Taman LTAT clusters is concentrated around RM171k-RM250k for ~650-750 sq ft units, with current asking ranges on PropertyGuru/EdgeProp around RM235k-RM270k and sold-price snapshots around RM300-RM375 psf for Sri Rakyat Apartment and RM300-RM358 psf for Taman LTAT. I did not scale the full 3,035 sq ft figure directly because for flats that figure is likely a title/parcel or land-share measure rather than the usable built-up area that portals price against; using it literally would overstate value materially. On a built-up basis, a fair current market estimate is about RM235k, with a realistic range of RM200k-RM270k and roughly RM320 psf.
